items.name: Silver Tyrian Duty Belt
items.description: A Tyrian duty belt, famously worn by the Tyrian Army, is a military accessory designed for utility and practicality. Typically made from leather or sturdy fabric, this belt is used to carry essential equipment.

items.name: YORUNOYO BackPack
